# 03.03-fix-warnings: Fix all build warnings

## Objective
Resolve all build warnings to achieve a warning-free build on net10.0-windows.

## Scope
- Address any nullable reference type warnings
- Fix deprecated API usage warnings
- Resolve any platform-specific warnings
- Fix any other warnings introduced by the upgrade

## Done when
- Project builds with zero warnings
- All warnings fixed (not suppressed)
- Code follows modern .NET best practices
